name: Koch Bus Svc
principals: Brian Koch (3rd gen owner); Sam Koch (4th gen, joined 2023); founded by Victor Koch; Curtis Koch (2nd gen)
districts_or_customers: Waconia Public Schools (ISD 110), Watertown-Mayer School District, multiple SW Metro special-ed districts, Head Start program; locations in Waconia (HQ), Watertown, and Shakopee
recent_news: Koch buses relocated to new parking facility in Waconia (2023-2024 per Waconia Patriot); Sam Koch joined as 4th generation March 2023, signaling continued family succession.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: ~135-vehicle family-owned MN operator (since 1938) with 3 yards covering SW Twin Cities metro, real special-needs book, multi-district relationships. Active 4th-gen entry lowers near-term succession likelihood but creates relationship-driven approach opportunity.

name: Goodman Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No verifiable news. Source-data website (tccmaterials.com) belongs to TCC Materials (concrete products), not a bus operator; 2025 Centre Pointe Blvd is a multi-tenant office park in Mendota Heights. A 'B H Goodman Bus Service Inc' exists but is Houston, TX (USDOT 1961364, 23 power units) — not Minnesota. Could not confirm an independent MN school-bus operator at this address.
fit_notes: Likely data-quality artifact (wrong website, generic office-park address); appears not to be a real MN independent school-bus operator. Deprioritize until physical operator existence can be verified.

name: Bennett & Bennett Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Granite Falls / Yellow Medicine County area (western MN); specific districts not publicly disclosed
recent_news: No material M&A or safety news identified; FMCSA snapshot (USDOT 937340) shows 22 power units, 21 drivers; operating continuously since 1990.
website: unconfirmed (source-data 'Bennett.edu' is a Bennett College domain, not the operator)
fit_notes: Small (~22 bus) family-owned western-MN operator, 35+ year history under single owner — fits Summit's micro tuck-in profile in rural MN, but limited scale. Owner age (~47) suggests longer succession runway; useful for geographic backfill rather than scale add.

name: Universal Bus Solutions
recent_news: ubsolutions.com resolves to 'Universal Business Solutions' — an IT/business consulting firm (MBE/DBE, Native American-owned, SDVOSB) HQ'd in Alpharetta GA, founded ~1995. No school-bus operations identified at the Frisco, TX address. Likely a Frisco satellite office or data-aggregator mis-tag.
website: https://ubsolutions.com (IT consultancy — NOT a bus operator)
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Exclude from Summit tuck-in universe — appears to be an IT consulting company miscategorized in the source list.

name: Bus & Truck Of Chicago Inc
districts_or_customers: n/a (services vehicles for CTA, Greyhound, municipal fleets and freight operators)
recent_news: 62,000 sq ft diesel repair facility in Bedford Park IL with 65-ft paint booth; offers bus and truck repair, collision/body, preventive maintenance — including IC, Thomas Built, Ford, Rev Group, ABC bus brands. Established 2002.
fit_notes: NOT a student-transport operator — this is a diesel bus/truck repair shop serving transit, motorcoach and fleet customers. Exclude from Summit operator tuck-in universe (could be a vendor relationship but not an acquisition target).
